articles.author: James Vyver
articles.title: 'We didn't give up': Afghan women's refugee cricketers celebrate ICC decision
articles.description: Five years since fleeing Afghanistan after the Taliban returned to power, the country's women's refugee cricket team has secured a pathway to compete at the international level.
articles.content:
In 2021, Afghanistan cricketer Benafsha Hashimi's life was under threat just for playing the sport she loves.
The Taliban's brutal regime had returned to power; women who played sport were being hun… [+6055 chars]

articles.title: Security is no longer a human scale thing, it is machine scale: Pankaj Rohatgi, Google
